emails.subject: Re: 465721.01&465723.01
emails.body: Re: 465721.01&465723.01 Sean has fixed these the computer picked up the off peak indices for the related deals #465720 and #465723. By the way, all our traders are inputting their deals now. I know you guys are checking out with brokers we'll try to expedite the process. Thanks, Kate From: Kimberly Allen 11/22/2000 10:19 AM
465721.01&465723.01 Kate, I think these two deals of Sean were entered twice for Sun and Holidays 0100 to 2400. Could you check on. ka
